programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.desc: George Clooney is Ryan Bingham, a corporate downsizing expert whose cherished life on the road is threatened.

programme.title: Humane
programme.desc: HUMANE takes place over a single day, mere months after a global ecological collapse has forced world leaders to reduce the earth’s population.

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: A demonstration against urban renewal project leads to death of a police and a teenage boy. The boy's father, who claims he's innocent, was arrested for the cop's death.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep9
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep10
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: You Will Die in 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun-woo tells Jung-yoon that she'll be stabbed to death in 6 hours. She doubts his words but still wants to find out the truth. She later realizes he is related to serial killings...

programme.title: Love, Lies
programme.desc: A gisaeng is consumed by jealousy after her friend finds success as a pop singer and her lover falls for her. Feeling betrayed, things begin to fall apart as she tries to regain the things she lost.

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: War of the Arrows
programme.desc: Set during the second Manchu invasion of Korea, Nam Yi, the best archer in Korea, goes up against the Qing Dynasty to rescue his younger sister Ja In - who was to be enslaved by the Manchurians.

programme.title: My Worst Neighbor
programme.desc: In a house with little soundproofing, a man and a woman living next door started a noise war. They then cohabitate through the wall, and catching up in subtle emotions...

programme.title: Concrete Utopia
programme.desc: Seoul has laid in ruin after an earthquake, leaving one single apartment remains standing. The apartment's resident representative strives to protect residents from outsiders...

programme.title: Toss Coin
programme.desc: A busker met a girl who makes decision through tossing a coin.

programme.title: No Other Choice
programme.desc: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a paper mill manager has no other choice but to turn to violence to eliminate those who stand in the way of his dream life.

programme.title: Something in the Rain Ep11
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.title: Innocent Witness

programme.title: The Unfair
programme.desc: A demonstration against urban renewal project leads to death of a police and a teenage boy. The boy's father, who claims he's innocent, was arrested for the cop's death.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Grayson wrangles Spirit "fair and square" and sends him to auction in another town --and there is nothing Lucky can do to stop him!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Spirit and Lucky desperately try to find a way back to one another.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The girl’s plans to attend the Governor’s Ball are waylaid when they save a pregnant horse.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Skidmark and White Shadow try to stop spring from coming by keeping a groundhog in his hole; Smoove loses the power behind his effortless cool.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The FAST crew's vacation is threatened by hard-partying toilet frogs. The Crew quits racing when they become obsessed with a fantasy racing league.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald accidentally volunteers a rag-tag group of Crackridge locals in an important game of Crackarack against Saddlerock. / When Mayor Fowler is away for the day, Archibald assumes Brock is now the Mayor of Crackridge.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald can’t wait to celebrate his Hatch Day with his family inside an impossibly fun theme park. But when Archibald accidentally gets sprayed by a skunk, he must try to get rid of his stank before his special day is ruined. / When Archibald overhears something suspicious about a neighbor, he reports it to his aunts who run the Neighborhood Bird Watch. With Archibald as their new recruit, they attempt to expose the neighbor’s suspicious shenanigans.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Motato temps Larry to goof off on their new job at Pa Grape's store/Captain Mike and Mr. Pea compete to get Junior and Tiny Pea the best pet ever

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a cat-in-the-box that startles Gabby, giving her the hiccups. Dr. Pandy and the Gabby Cats try several cures, but it isn't until CatRat scares the hiccups out of Gabby that they go away!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.desc: Tom orchestrates a “safe” tour of the realms to convince Olivia that the Hidden World is safe for them to explore.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss stumbles upon the legendary hidden city of San Lorenzo, and soon finds himself forced to protect it from thieves.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.desc: Struggling to find their purpose on the Betterman farm, the Croods see an opportunity to prove their worth by harvesting Phil’s perilous (and sticky) bounceberries.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Templetons head to a new family restaurant only to run into Bootsy Calico!

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Moving to an exotic new home, an adventurous teenager meets a new group of kids and discovers a dragon in the fissure.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom forges a friendship with the dragon and discovers an entire world of dragons within the fissure.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun encounter unexpected dangers and are separated while exploring the Hidden Realm of dragons. Tom introduces Jun to the dragon world, and Jun bonds with a dragon of her own – Wu and Wei.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.title: Islands of Creation

programme.title: Aging in the Wild

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald can’t wait to celebrate his Hatch Day with his family inside an impossibly fun theme park. programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom forges a friendship with the dragon and discovers an entire world of dragons within the fissure.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun encounter unexpected dangers and are separated while exploring the Hidden Realm of dragons. Tom introduces Jun to the dragon world, and Jun bonds with a dragon of her own – Wu and Wei.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po, at the top of his game but lonely, comes across two weasels stealing an earthquake causing gauntlet and tries to stop them, but inadvertently destroys a town. He loses his title as Dragon Master and teams up with Wandering Blade, a knight on a mission from England, to track down the weasels and get his title back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: An average high school student, Jim Lake, yearns for adventure and he gets more than he bargained for when he inherits the mantle of Trollhunter after the previous Trollhunter is killed

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Blood on the Crown
programme.desc: Citizens fighting for independence from Britain were met by an Army-quelled bloody riot that the government covered up. Over 100 Maltese were falsely jailed for instigating the violence.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: The Killer Inside: The Ruth Finley Story
programme.desc: Ruth and her husband Ed's tranquil life in Wichita, Kansas is suddenly turned upside down when Ed suffers a heart attack. While Ed is in the hospital, Ruth's starts to receive mysterious threats.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: Living with my Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the man who killed her and allows him to work on her property, only to find that what's past is not always past.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: After recovering from cancer, Geralyn's doctor encouraged her to embrace life with husband Art. Their journey leads to the ocean, where they are on a hunt to find a home that truly speaks to them.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: In honour of Rachael's dear friend, legendary singer Tony Bennett, she prepares osso buco, a dish of succulent braised veal shanks, served Florentine-style with large slices of bread.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: It’s the final Immunity Challenge and a Lucky Dip proves fortunate for some, challenging for others. With two randomly picked ingredients, each contestant must perfectly pair them to create a winning dish.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Tune is as host Michael Yo takes us to places set to satisfy the palate, while also challenging our ideas of a dining experience. Our first stop is a sushi-bar and game-show joint in New York City.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Dr. Lyndsey joins Dr. Lee to help David, who is fearful that the lump on his jaw might be cancerous. Carla has a mysterious, large bulge on her thigh that concerns Dr. Lee.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: Rachael makes a new version of sloppy joes, a quintessential family-favourite dinner, by adding pineapple, peppers and garlic and serving it on Hawaiian-style sweet buns.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: A Boyfriend to die for
programme.desc: Olivia never wanted to be known as a product of nepotism, but as a rising star in her father's firm, that's exactly how people see her. Determined to prove herself, she meets Jonathan Rothfield.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca score a lead on an unlisted property located in a sought-after neighbourhood in Austin. However, excitement soon turns to panic when they discover that the entire house is a junkyard.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Strategy and mind-games rule the kitchen as contestants bid against one another, trading time for ingredients in a MasterChef classic – the time auction. Contestants compete to cook to avoid elimination.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: A Japanese karate master and Diao Er, who has been expelled from his martial arts school, return to the school to kill the school master and his disciples. After the massacre, disciple Lei Ming embarks on a vigorous training regime and vows to avenge their deaths. A fatal battle is about to begin…

programme.title: The Flying Guillotine
programme.desc: Ma Teng is an assassin of the ‘Flying Guillotine Squad’, a group of killers commissioned by the Emperor Yung. When Ma starts to question the morality of his missions, he finds himself becoming a fugitive hunted by his former comrades.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: Focusing on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Hosted by Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: The British city of Oxford is home to the renowned University of Oxford. The city's 900-year academic history shapes its streets with rich traditions, historic colleges, and a unique scholarly spirit.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: #2 Banana-Slip Physics
programme.desc: Slip on banana peel, take a tumble: the classic comedy gag! Mabuchi Kiyoshi's serious search for scientific proof of that slipperiness revealed that peels have properties similar to human body parts!

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: The changing leaves, the transient beauty of the ancient capital in fall. Dive deep into Kyoto, still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Asking a shop manager to follow orders from head office. Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical, effective workplace expressions and understand business culture.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Kojima Sachiyo runs a different sort of bar. Customers make small items out of scrap material. Finding new appreciation for things once seen as disposable, all while enjoying a drink with friends.

programme.title: Documentary360: A Century on Film
programme.desc: It's 1942; Germany and Japan continue their rapid military advance. Ukraine and Southeast Asia are stripped of resources, but Stalingrad and Midway soon mark a major turning point.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: We spotlight Sound! Euphonium, a coming-of-age band drama. Novelist Takeda Ayano recalls her real high-school band days and Kyoto Animation showcases Uji's scenery and hand-drawn performance scenes.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Seeing the baby laugh when tickled, Mee thinks everyone likes tickles and happily tickles every child in sight. But Mee's friend Hee suddenly gets angry and says, "Stop it! Don't tickle me!"

programme.title: Design Ah Neo: Ears
programme.desc: Design is fun! Design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us. An episode on Ears.

programme.title: Tiny Desk Concerts Japan
programme.desc: Japanese city pop is being rediscovered around the world, and EPO, one of the genre's most celebrated singers, captures everything that makes this music so loved across borders and generations.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-9.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Most commercial honey in Japan comes from Western honeybees, whose honey can be harvested several times a year. Japanese honeybees are much less productive but keeping them can be a real education.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View Of Japan
programme.desc: A local cat guides us to a fairy tale palace-or rather, a shrine that looks like the palace! Together with Iwago, we visit scenic spots, including a tea farm that's patrolled by an early-rising cat.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Passang Lama Bhotia fell in love with Mt. Fuji as a child in Nepal. After becoming a Himalayan mountain guide, he came to Japan and now works on the mountain he dreamed of, guiding foreign tourists.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change The World
programme.desc: Due to global warming, the bamboo habitat range in Japan is expanding and abandoned bamboo groves are encroaching on forests and farmland nationwide. How should we associate with this iconic plant?

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Igarashi Hisae (Interior designer) visits Osaka. Glass was a key industry in Osaka from the early 1900s. Igarashi learns how glassblowers used their skills to make Japanese vacuum flasks.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We explore a factory in Sagamihara where they make machines that skewer ingredients for famous Japanese foods like yakitori and oden. How do they ensure each piece is cooked to soft, juicy perfection?

programme.desc: Cape Ashizuri is marked by rugged cliffs and peculiar rocks. A strong current off its coast has been the cause of many accidents. Enjoy the scenery at the cape, a place of worship, in time-lapse.

programme.title: The Seasons Of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each season.

programme.title: Bosai: Firetornadoes
programme.desc: 100 years ago, on September 1, 1923, a major earthquake struck Japan. The Great Kanto Earthquake left an estimated 105,000 people dead or missing, yet most of the victims perished in fires. Why?

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to sleep. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: Bryan Singer supersizes the "Jack and the Beanstalk" legend in this epic action twist on a classic tale, starring Nicholas Hoult, Stanley Tucci, Bill Nighy, Ewan McGregor, Ian McShane and more. When a young farmhand unwittingly opens a gateway between our world and a fearsome race of giants, an ancient war is reignited. Unleashed upon the Earth, the marauding giants strive to reclaim the land they once lost, forcing Jack into the battle of his life to stop them. Fighting for a kingdom and its people -- and the love of a princess, of course -- he comes face to face with the legendary goliaths and, in the process, become a legend himself.

programme.title: Doc (Season 2)
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Press Review

programme.title: Through Time
programme.desc: In search of her grandfather’s secret life as a Force 136 operative, Xin En turns to LiDAR technology to uncover what history has hidden. Each discovery reveals espionage, sacrifice and blurred morality.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: They Wait in the Dark
programme.desc: Amy and her adopted son Adrian flee from her abusive ex-girlfriend Judith. Seeking refuge in an abandoned farmhouse in Amy's Kansas hometown, they confront a supernatural evil force from her dark past that haunts Adrian. As Judith pursues them, Amy and Adrian must face the dangers both outside and within the house.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: Murder at the Motel
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: Sleeping with a Killer (S2)
programme.desc: A distress call in a quiet English village leads police to a volatile Tinder romance, where a man's escalating jealousy puts a young mother and her child in grave danger.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Known for the murders of University of Florida students, Danny Rolling's first killings were in his hometown of Shreveport, Louisiana. He longed for a loving family, but he destroyed one instead.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: Folks in Anchorage, Alaska, are shaken to their core when a popular barista goes missing from the town's favourite coffee shop.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: Delve deep into the brutal world of kidnappings in the Philippines. Taken by criminals and terrorists, some victims pay ransoms. Others make daring escapes. Some don't make it home alive.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2)
programme.desc: Cambodia's forests are being cleared by illegal logging cartels, leaving behind barren land and desperate villagers. Now villagers are fighting back, but the cartels are prepared to kill.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Matt Riffle investigates the murder of a New Orleans native, who was shot and killed after a brief altercation. Det. Tanisha Smith investigates the homicide of a mother and the abduction of her daughter.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A career criminal and first-time arrestee bond in custody; an expecting father faces the prospect of missing his child's birth, and a 20-year-old aspiring model gets a taste of the inside of a jail cell.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A suspect loses his cool in the interrogation room; a man with a shocking gunshot wound leaves police with more questions than answers; a game of hide and seek turns deadly; and more.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A model is questioned about a deadly encounter with her boyfriend; a man makes a cold-blooded confession; a person of interest says too much; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: After a man is shot dead, pathologist Dr. Antoine Wrice works with investigators to interpret unusual evidence found on the scene and unwind the complex case that could be more than a typical homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: During a routine undercover prostitution sting, Columbus Vice Detective Andrew Mitchell shoots and kills 23-year-old Donna Dalton Castleberry.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend. When she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner—who was standing nearby—is accused.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Terri blames hoarding on her busy schedule, but past trauma reveals the truth. After a fire raised safety concerns, she must clean up with the Hoarders team.
